name: Walnut Tablet
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the sugar, condensed milk and sweet milk into a saucepan.
2. Stir until the mixture boils.
3. Continue boiling for 20 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and add the chopped walnuts.
5. Stir until the mixture thickens.
6. Pour into a greased tin.
7. Allow to cool completely before cutting.
